title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Siemens India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Siemens India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? Siemens India in Lucknow offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Siemens India:
Siemens India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens India!
